## Usage
### Add README File
Ref: [About READMEs](https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/managing-your-repositorys-settings-and-features/customizing-your-repository/about-readmes#about-readmes)
```
mkdir $HOME/.github
vim $HOME/.github/README.md
```
